BEFORE FILING: Search open AND closed issues. If your issue already

## Is this a Bundles Forge issue or a platform issue?
<!-- Bundles Forge is a toolkit that generates artifacts for multiple
     platforms. Some reported "bugs" are actually issues in the
     underlying platform or model. If you're not sure, try reproducing
     without Bundles Forge.

     If the problem persists without Bundles Forge, file the issue with
     your platform instead. -->

- [ ] I confirmed this issue does not occur without Bundles Forge

## What happened?
<!-- Be specific. "It doesn't work" is not a bug report. -->

1.
2.
3.

<!-- What should have happened? -->

## Actual behavior
<!-- What happened instead? -->

## Debug log or error output
<!-- A debug log, audit output (`bundles-forge audit-plugin .`), or
     error traceback is the single most helpful thing you can include.
     Without one, we're guessing. -->
